"[45] 36-824 ADVS INVLD PTY STATED THEY WERE WORKING ON INSURANCE TO GET THE VEH "
"[44] 36-824 MALE PTY ADMITTED TO DRIVING THE VEH - GOT A STATEMENT ON WHAT HAPPENED // WAS DRIVING ON THE 17TH DEER CAME OUT AND JERKED HIS WHEEL TO THE RIGHT AND HIT A STUMP AND WENT OFF THE RDWY"
"[26] 90-17 REQ TO SEE IF RB CAN RESPOND TO THE RO'S ADDRESS TO TRY AND MAKE CONTACT AND SEE IF THEY WERE INVLD IN A TC "

"[20] 90-17 REQ TO INQ W/ FIRE IF THERE IS A UNIT 97"
"[9] VEH : CHEV SLV PK TK - 66112U3 // ON THE BACK OF THE TRUCK HE HAS " AIR RACKS MATTER " AND " FAST GASH ""
"[8] VEHICLE WAS COLD // NEG LIGHTS ON // TRIED TO OPEN DOOR IS JAMMED THOUGH"
"[6] THE VEHICLE HAS A BROKEN WINDOW THAT WAS COVERED WITH PLASTIC "
"[5] THE VEH IS DOWN OVER THE HILL // OVER THE GULLY // MISSED THE TURN AND WENT DOWN TO A TREE"
"[4] WE WENT OUT SR299 TO HELEAN RD TO THE TOWN OF HELENA AND THEN KEPT GOING 6 MILES PAST THE LITTLE TOWN ONTO HOBO GULCH RD AND THEN 6 MILES UP HOBO GULCH RD "
